decisions.title: Anthropic被指"阉割"Claude：性能下降、算力紧缺疑云与用户信任危机
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Major new controversy: Fortune, VentureBeat, The Register all reported April 14-15 that Anthropic quietly reduced Claude's default effort level, AMD senior director filed detailed GitHub issue with 6,852 sessions proving performance collapse, and April 15 outage amplified compute crunch speculation.

decisions.title: Apple曾威胁下架Grok应用：NBC曝光深度伪造内容审核信函
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. NBC News obtained Apple's letter to senators on April 15 revealing January 2026 threat to remove Grok from App Store over sexualized deepfakes. Despite xAI changes, NBC documents Grok still generating nonconsensual imagery.

decisions.title: NAACP起诉xAI：孟菲斯AI数据中心非法排放威胁黑人社区健康
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. NAACP filed Clean Air Act lawsuit on April 14 against xAI's 27 unpermitted gas turbines in Southaven, Mississippi, emitting 1,700 tons NOx and 19 tons formaldehyde per year near Black communities.

decisions.title: Accel募集50亿美元AI基金：Anthropic和Cursor背后的VC加倍下注
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Bloomberg reported April 15 that Accel raised $5B in new funds ($4B Leaders Fund + $650M sidecar), averaging $200M checks for late-stage AI companies. Anthropic stake has quadrupled in months.

decisions.title: a16z领投AI超级PAC突破5000万美元：硅谷砸重金影响中期选举
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. FEC filings released April 15 show Leading the Future super PAC now exceeds $51M, with $25M from a16z and $25M from OpenAI's Brockman. Total 2026 cycle fundraising reaches $140M across entities.

decisions.title: OpenAI退出挪威Stargate数据中心：Microsoft接手，IPO前收缩基建野心
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. CNBC reported April 15 that OpenAI abandoned direct lease for 230MW Narvik facility, Microsoft taking 30,000 Vera Rubin chips. Following UK Stargate pause, signals pre-IPO spending discipline.

decisions.title: 诺和诺德联手OpenAI加速药物发现：全球市值最高药企押注AI研发
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Novo Nordisk (Wegovy/Ozempic maker) announced strategic partnership with OpenAI on April 14 to deploy AI across drug discovery, manufacturing, and operations, with full integration by end of 2026.

decisions.title: Google Gemini "个人智能"全球上线：AI首次大规模接入用户私人数据
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Google rolled out Personal Intelligence globally (excluding EU) on April 14, letting Gemini access Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Photos, YouTube, Maps data to personalize responses. First AI assistant with deep personal data access at global scale.

decisions.title: OpenAI发布GPT-5.4-Cyber：降低安全围栏的网络安全专用模型回应Mythos
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. OpenAI launched GPT-5.4-Cyber on April 14, a cybersecurity-permissive fine-tune with binary reverse engineering capabilities, restricted to vetted security researchers via Trusted Access for Cyber (TAC) program. Direct response to Anthropic's Mythos.

decisions.title: Notion 3.4发布Skills功能：AI Agent从"通用助手"进化为"专属员工"
decisions.reason: Previously published on 04-09 with title 'Notion Agent已自动构建超50%数据库，Ivan Zhao押注「按成果付费」模式'. New info: Notion 3.4 Part 2 released April 14 with Skills (save workflows for Agent), Calendar/Mail/Slack integration, inline document editing, n8n integration, improved Custom Agents.

decisions.title: Claude Code桌面端大改版：多会话并行+拖拽布局重新定义AI编程工作区
decisions.reason: Previously published on 04-14 with title 'Claude Code推出Routines'. New info: Complete desktop app redesign with multi-session sidebar, drag-and-drop pane layout, integrated terminal, in-app file editor, rebuilt diff viewer. VentureBeat enterprise review. Routines have three categories (Scheduled/API/Webhook) with tier limits (5/15/25 per day).

decisions.title: OpenAI Spud仍未发布：4月14日和16日传闻落空
decisions.reason: Already published on 04-13 with title 'OpenAI "Spud"发布在即：GPT-5.5/6预训练完成'. No substantive new information — April 14 and 16 rumored dates passed without a launch. Polymarket odds unchanged. Window shifted to April 21-May 25 but this is speculation, not new facts.
